scripts.build: PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bun build src/hook-handler.ts --outdir dist --target bun --bundle && PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bun build src/mcp-server.ts --outdir dist --target bun --bundle
scripts.dev: PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bun build src/hook-handler.ts --outdir dist --target bun --bundle --watch
